visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The first phase takes place in a brightly lit Costco warehouse. A young woman with long dark hair, wearing a black and white off-the-shoulder top, holds two large tubs of cream cheese spread towards the camera. She is smiling and speaking directly to the viewer. In the background, other shoppers in casual attire, such as a man in a striped shirt, are seen walking through the wide aisles lined with metal shelving and industrial lighting. (2) The scene transitions to a brightly lit indoor home environment. Two young women are sitting at a table; the same woman from the first phase is joined by another woman wearing a white turtleneck and a dark blue beret. They are enthusiastically holding and presenting one of the cream cheese tubs. In the background, a pet enclosure with soft toys is visible against a neutral wall. The lighting is soft and consistent throughout, and the women use expressive hand gestures while talking, ending the video with big smiles and double thumbs-up gestures.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. [Slogan]: 如何保存更久. [Variety]: 楓糖核桃乳酪醬. (2) [Subtitle]: 楓糖核桃乳酪醬以前是焦糖它現在改成楓糖. [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. [Slogan]: 如何保存更久. [Variety]: 楓糖核桃乳酪醬. (3) [Subtitle]: 它現在改成楓糖來試試看改成楓糖有什麼區別吧. [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. [Slogan]: 如何保存更久. [Variety]: 楓糖核桃乳酪醬. (4) [Variety]: 楓糖核桃乳酪醬. [Subtitle]: 楓糖核桃乳酪醬這一個真的很值得買. (5) [Variety]: 楓糖核桃乳酪醬. [Subtitle]: 因為那麼大罐239元. [Slogan]: 大罐239元. (6) [Variety]: 楓糖核桃乳酪醬. [Subtitle]: 裡面的核桃量非常的誠意. (7) [Variety]: 楓糖核桃乳酪醬. [Subtitle]: 以及這個奶油乳酪非常的濃香. (8) [Variety]: 楓糖核桃乳酪醬. [Subtitle]: 加上它乳酪是有點點酸酸的. (9) [Variety]: 楓糖核桃乳酪醬. [Subtitle]: 所以它搭配麵包就是很爽口很好吃. (10) [Variety]: 楓糖核桃乳酪醬. [Subtitle]: 缺點就是只能放5天. (11) [Variety]: 楓糖核桃乳酪醬. [Subtitle]: 所以大家帶回來的時候直接抹在妳愛的貝果或麵包上. (12) [Variety]: 楓糖核桃乳酪醬. [Subtitle]: 然後再讓它進去冷凍庫. (13) [Variety]: 楓糖核桃乳酪醬. [Subtitle]: 這樣子更好保存以及要吃的時候再加熱. (14) [Variety]: 楓糖核桃乳酪醬. [Subtitle]: 就可以很新鮮的吃到好吃的醬嘍. (15) [Variety]: 經典不敗.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 2 main female creators, and at least 3 shoppers visible in the Costco background scene.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: One woman has long dark hair, wearing a black and white off-the-shoulder top. The other wears a white turtleneck and a dark blue beret.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The initial background is a busy Costco warehouse with industrial shelving and shoppers. The subsequent background is a clean indoor home setting featuring a pet cage with plush toys.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with a friendly and energetic female voice narrating in Mandarin. The background contains subtle, muffled ambient sounds characteristic of a large commercial store, including faint cart movements and distant human murmurs. (2) A sharp transition occurs as upbeat, high-tempo pop electronic BGM fades in. Two distinct female voices engage in a rapid, cheerful dialogue with high pitch variability. Frequent 'pop' and 'bubble' sound effects are synchronized with visual text overlays. The interplay between the energetic speech, the rhythmic electronic beat, and the stylized SFX creates a lively and persuasive atmosphere. The voices maintain high clarity and positive valence throughout the product review.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Linear: Hook -> Evidence -> Practical Tip -> Summary/CTA
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves as a shopping recommendation and practical guide for a specific Costco food product. It uses an enthusiastic product unboxing and testing format to highlight the value and taste of the 'Maple Walnut Cream Cheese,' while also providing a strategic tip on how to freeze it to extend its shelf life.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct display of product and brand logo (Costco), along with explicit pricing information and verbal recommendations.

high_inference.freeDescribe: High-quality social media production with clear audio, vibrant text overlays, and a well-defined structure catering to supermarket shoppers and home cooks.
